pageContext.name: Tengen Uzui and Gyomei Himejima
pageContext.description: Sideshow and MegaHouse present the Tengen Uzui and Gyomei Himejima Collectible Set!  Standing at 4.33' tall, both demon slayers are seen wearing their outfits from the hit anime show, sitting anxiously, waiting for you to add them to your Demon Slayer collection!
